description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage. Use a generic Linux image (e.g., ubuntu:latest) and execute the following commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, pip install -r requirements.txt, ./unit_test_empty_destination_dir, py.test --cov=./picture_video_organizer/ unit_test/, flake8 --max-line-length=120 --ignore=F401 picture_video_organizer/*.py, pydocstyle picture_video_organizer/*.py. Do not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules, and rely on the default branch triggers.
